sentences.english: Why do you think traveling is valuable?
I believe traveling is one of the most valuable experiences a person can have.
sentences.korean: 여행은 사람이 할 수 있는 가장 가치 있는 경험 중 하나라고 생각해요.

sentences.english: First it opens your mind to different cultures and ways of life.
sentences.korean: 첫째 다른 문화와 삶의 방식에 마음을 열어줘요.

sentences.english: When I visited Vietnam I realized how much I had taken simple things like clean water for granted.
sentences.korean: 베트남을 방문했을 때 깨끗한 물 같은 간단한 것을 얼마나 당연시 여겼는지 깨달았어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?

sentences.english: Second travel forces you to step out of your comfort zone.
sentences.korean: 둘째 여행은 안락 지대에서 벗어나게 해요.

sentences.english: Navigating a foreign city where you don't speak the language builds problem-solving skills and self-reliance.
sentences.korean: 언어를 모르는 외국 도시를 헤쳐 나가는 것은 문제 해결 능력과 자립심을 길러줘요.

sentences.english: The memories and lessons from travel stay with you for a lifetime.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: A Hobby You Want to Start
